hero.title:
Connect With Our Experts 
 At BuilderTek
hero.description: Have questions? Want to submit feedback? Or Have a specific business need? Reach out today to see how BuilderTek can help you grow your construction business.

financialControl.title: Talk To A Construction Technology Expert
financialControl.description: Already using our software and need assistance? Have Questions about BuilderTek or want to schedule a demo? Reach out to our customer support for 24/7 support, or fill out the contact form, and our team will reach out to you.

form.title: Get in Touch
form.subtitle: Required fields are marked with an asterisk (*)

fields.optIn: Yes, I want to get emails from BuilderTek about products, promotions, events, and featured content at the email address above.

form.footer: By clicking submit, you agree to our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service. We may contact you regarding our professional services.
